mike_mentions.text: Stakeholder Feedback Response Submitted by: Michael Butlin Where should this feature live on the site? Singular location — Geo homepages Do we want design variants to A/B test across pages? Not decided yet

mike_mentions.author: Shane McGrath
mike_mentions.text: I think this is pretty good but to note some of the logos are fairly pixelated. Perhaps these are OK for now though?

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Designs can be found here for the dimensions.

mike_mentions.author: Ciara Carroll
mike_mentions.text: the dark blue and gold color combinations do not feel fresh at all. the ombre gradient. there is no need to repeat a icon that is similar of the favicon.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: thanks for the feedback. Yes we did agree to only have the offers when they have a match only. That was an oversight from my part after changing the designs. They're now removed.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Here are the Proposed designs with the changes. I put different options under each other in the same page. Let me know what you think. Prototype link from Claude "only for functionality" not design.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Hey @Mike You can find the designs proposed here. There are two options in the file

mike_mentions.text: to share logo information from EVE and to update ticket in relation to tracking. Thanks both
